applicability_notes: Single-op mapping: torch.arange(start, end, step) -> ttnn.arange(start, end, step). Output is 1-D of length ceil(|end-start|/|step|). Default output: ROW_MAJOR layout, bfloat16 dtype, DRAM interleaved. Commonly produced as uint32 for position-id generation (then reshaped to (1,-1)) or float32 for RoPE frequency/position vectors (then converted to TILE_LAYOUT before elementwise math). Frequently host-cacheable since output is deterministic per (start,end,step,dtype,layout,device).

placement_observations.source: unit test: assert output_tensor.memory_config() == ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG and output_tensor.layout == ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT (default placement when no memory_config passed)

model call site: ttnn.arange(0, max_position_embeddings, 1, dtype=ttnn.uint32, memory_config=self.config.embedding_memcfg) followed by ttnn.reshape(pos, (1,-1)) — position-id table for embedding lookup, dtype uint32

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 1D float32, length = head_dim/2 or seq_len (RoPE frequency/position vectors)
placement_observations.source: model call site (RoPE precompute): ttnn.arange(0, head_dim, 2, dtype=ttnn.float32) / ttnn.arange(0, seq_len, 1, dtype=ttnn.float32) then ttnn.to_layout(..., TILE_LAYOUT) before multiply/pow/reciprocal — created row-major then tilized for compute
model call site: ttnn.arange(0, num_positions, 1, dtype=ttnn.uint32, device=mesh_device) then reshape (1,-1) — default interleaved DRAM, no explicit memory_config
